metadata.name: Market a Commercial Property for Lease

description: An agent needs to market a vacant industrial warehouse space.

nodes.task_description: Create a listing on commercial real estate platforms like LoopNet and CREXi.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates a detailed and accurate listing.

nodes.task_description: Design an email marketing blast to send to a list of local commercial brokers.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a professional email flyer for the property.

nodes.task_description: Send the email blast and track the open and click-through rates.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the marketing email and monitors its performance.
